Base.global_services:
no service pad
service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime
service timestamps log datetime msec localtime
service password-encryption
no platform punt-keepalive disable-kernel-core
Base.mgmt_vrf:
vrf definition Mgmt-vrf
address-family ipv4
exit-address-family
Base.aaa:
aaa new-model
aaa authentication login default local
aaa authentication enable default enable
aaa authorization exec default local
Base.security:
no ip source-route
no service call-home
Base.ssh:
crypto key generate rsa modulus 4096
ip ssh version 2
ip ssh time-out 60
Base.switching:
vtp mode transparent
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree extend system-id
memory free low-watermark processor 134344
redundancy
transceiver type all
monitoring
exit
vlan dot1q tag native
Base.mgmt_port:
vrf forwarding Mgmt-vrf
no ip address
negotiation auto
exit
Base.line_config:
line con 0
exec-timeout 9 0
line vty 0 4
exec-timeout 9 0
transport input ssh
line vty 5 15
exec-timeout 0 0
transport input none
exit
Base.disabled_port_template:
description //Disabled Port
switchport access vlan {{ blackhole_vlan }}
switchport mode access
shutdown

Base 2.global_services:
no service pad
service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime
service timestamps log datetime msec localtime
service timestamps log datetime msec show-timezone
service password-encryption
no platform punt-keepalive disable-kernel-core
no cdp run
no cns config initial
no cns exec
no cns image
no service config
no service finger
no service tcp-small-servers
no service udp-small-servers
Base 2.mgmt_vrf:
vrf definition Mgmt-vrf
address-family ipv4
exit-address-family
Base 2.aaa:
aaa new-model
aaa authentication login default local
aaa authentication enable default enable
aaa authorization exec default local
Base 2.security:
no ip source-route
no service call-home
no ip domain lookup
Base 2.ssh:
ip ssh version 2
ip ssh dh min size 2048
ip ssh time-out 60
ip ssh authentication-retries 3
ip ssh server algorithm encryption aes256-gcm aes256-ctr aes192-ctr aes128-gcm aes128-ctr
ip ssh client algorithm encryption aes256-gcm aes256-ctr aes192-ctr aes128-gcm aes128-ctr
ip ssh server algorithm mac hmac-sha2-512 hmac-sha2-256
ip ssh client algorithm mac hmac-sha2-512 hmac-sha2-256
crypto key generate rsa general-keys modulus 4096
ip ssh bulk-mode 131072
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
Base 2.switching:
vtp mode transparent
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree loopguard default
spanning-tree extend system-id
memory free low-watermark processor 134344
redundancy
transceiver type all
monitoring
exit
vlan dot1q tag native
Base 2.mgmt_port:
vrf definition Mgmt-vrf
address-family ipv4
exit-address-family
exit
Base 2.line_config:
line con 0
exec-timeout 9 0
line vty 0 4
exec-timeout 9 0
transport input ssh
line vty 5 15
exec-timeout 0 0
transport input none
exit

aaa session-id common
Base 2.disabled_port_template:
description //Disabled Port
switchport access vlan {{ blackhole_vlan }}
switchport mode access
shutdown

Cisco L2 Baseline (example).global_services:
no service config
no service finger
no service tcp-small-servers
no service udp-small-servers
no service pad
no service call-home
no cns config initial
no cns exec
no cns image
service password-encryption
service timestamps log datetime msec utc show-timezone
service unsupported-transceiver
no errdisable detect cause gbic-invalid
errdisable flap-setting cause link-flap max-flaps 10 time 10
errdisable recovery cause link-flap
file privilege 15
udld enable
no cdp run
no ip name-server
no ip domain lookup
login block-for 900 attempts 3 within 120
no ip boot server
no ip bootp server
no ip dns server
no ip finger
no ip rcmd rcp-enable
no ip rcmd rsh-enable
no ip gratuitous-arps
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
ip http timeout-policy idle 300 life 600 requests 1
ip tcp synwait-time 10
ip tcp path-mtu-discovery
memory free low-watermark processor 8199
Cisco L2 Baseline (example).logging:
logging host <SYSLOG_IP_1>
logging host <SYSLOG_IP_2>
logging on
logging trap notifications
login on-failure log
login on-success log
logging buffered 102400 informational
logging count
logging history warnings
logging history size 20
logging userinfo
logging origin-id hostname
!
archive
log config
logging enable
notify syslog contenttype plaintext
hidekeys
logging size 1000
exit
exit
Cisco L2 Baseline (example).aaa:
aaa new-model
!
aaa common-criteria policy PASSWORD_POLICY
numeric-count 1
special-case 1
char-changes 8
min-length 15
max-length 127
upper-case 1
lower-case 1
exit
!
aaa session-id common
!
radius server RADIUS1
address ipv4 <RADIUS_IP_1> auth-port 1812 acct-port 1813
key 7 <RADIUS_KEY_1>
!
radius server RADIUS2
address ipv4 <RADIUS_IP_2> auth-port 1812 acct-port 1813
key 7 <RADIUS_KEY_2>
!
aaa group server radius RADIUS_GROUP
server name RADIUS1
server name RADIUS2
exit
!
ip radius source-interface vlan <MGMT_VLAN>
aaa authentication login default group RADIUS_GROUP local
aaa authorization exec default group RADIUS_GROUP local if-authenticated
Cisco L2 Baseline (example).security:
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree loopguard default
spanning-tree extend system-id
Cisco L2 Baseline (example).ssh:
ip ssh version 2
ip ssh dh min size 2048
ip ssh time-out 60
ip ssh authentication-retries 3
ip ssh server algorithm encryption aes256-gcm aes256-ctr aes192-ctr aes128-gcm aes128-ctr
ip ssh client algorithm encryption aes256-gcm aes256-ctr aes192-ctr aes128-gcm aes128-ctr
ip ssh server algorithm mac hmac-sha2-512 hmac-sha2-256
ip ssh client algorithm mac hmac-sha2-512 hmac-sha2-256
crypto key generate rsa general-keys modulus 2048
Cisco L2 Baseline (example).switching:
vtp mode off
transceiver type all
 monitoring
exit
diagnostic bootup level minimal
platform punt-keepalive disable-kernel-core
Cisco L2 Baseline (example).line_config:
line vty 0 4
 access-class SWITCH_MGMT in vrf-also
 session-timeout 5
 exec-timeout 5 0
 transport input ssh
 transport output ssh
 logging synchronous
exit
line vty 5 98
 access-class SWITCH_MGMT in vrf-also
  transport input none
  no exec
exit
line con 0
 session-timeout 5
 exec-timeout 5 0
 logging synchronous
 timeout login response 120
 stopbits 1
exit
Cisco L2 Baseline (example).disabled_port_template:
description //Disabled Access
switchport mode access
switchport nonegotiate
switchport access vlan {{ blackhole_vlan }}
switchport port-security
switchport port-security mac-address sticky
switchport port-security maximum 1
switchport block unicast
spanning-tree guard root
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree portfast
storm-control broadcast level bps 1g
storm-control unicast level bps 1g
shutdown

custom_sections.name: Switch Management ACL
custom_sections.commands:
ip access-list extended SWITCH_MGMT
 10 deny icmp any any fragments log-input
 20 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_1 }} any eq 22 log
 30 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_2 }} any eq 22 log
 40 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_3 }} any eq 22 log
 50 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_4 }} any eq 22 log
 60 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_5 }} any eq 22 log
 70 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_6 }} any eq 22 log
 80 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_7 }} any eq 22 log
 90 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_8 }} any eq 22 log
 100 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_9 }} any eq 22 log
 110 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_10 }} any eq 22 log
 120 deny ip any any log-input
exit

custom_sections.name: DHCP and IGMP Snooping
NTP
custom_sections.commands:
ntp authentication-key 125 sha1 {{ ntp_key }} 7
ntp authenticate
ntp trusted-key 125
ntp server {{ ntp_server_1 }} key 125 prefer
ntp server {{ ntp_server_2 }} key 125
!
clock timezone UTC 0

custom_sections.name: SNMPv3

 access-class SWITCH_MGMT in vrf-also

custom_sections.commands:
ip access-list extended SWITCH_MGMT
 10 deny icmp any any fragments log-input
 20 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_1 }} any eq 22 log
 30 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_2 }} any eq 22 log
 40 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_3 }} any eq 22 log
 50 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_4 }} any eq 22 log
 60 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_5 }} any eq 22 log
 70 permit tcp host {{ mgmt_acl_host_6 }} any eq 22 log

custom_sections.name: DHCP and IGMP Snooping
NTP
custom_sections.commands:
ntp authentication-key 125 sha1 {{ ntp_key }} 7
ntp authenticate
ntp trusted-key 125
ntp source Loopback0
ntp server {{ ntp_server_1 }} key 125 prefer
ntp server {{ ntp_server_2 }} key 125
!
clock timezone UTC 0

custom_sections.name: SNMPv3
custom_sections.commands:
snmp-server view READ iso included
snmp-server view WRITE iso included
snmp-server group GROUP v3 priv read READ write WRITE
snmp-server user {{ snmp_user }} GROUP v3 auth sha-2 512 {{ snmp_auth_password }} priv aes 256 {{ snmp_priv_password }}
snmp-server host {{ snmp_host }} version 3 priv {{ snmp_user }}
snmp-server source-interface informs Loopback0
snmp-server trap-source Loopback0
snmp-server enable traps
